# Boton "Show more accommodation" SERP (Desktop)

## Preconditions
- Browser is open and ready

## Steps
1. Navigate to https://es.stayforlong.com/es/city/madrid
2. Click Show more accommodation button
3. Wait 5 seconds
4. Click Show more accommodation button
5. Wait 5 seconds
6. Click Show more accommodation button
